# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    # Read input
    coords = list(map(int, sys.stdin.read().split()))
    a, b, c, d, e, f = coords[:6]
    g, h, i, j, k, l = coords[6:]

    # Compute the overlap along each axis
    x_overlap = max(0, min(d, j) - max(a, g))
    y_overlap = max(0, min(e, k) - max(b, h))
    z_overlap = max(0, min(f, l) - max(c, i))

    # Check if all overlaps are positive
    if x_overlap > 0 and y_overlap > 0 and z_overlap > 0:
        print("Yes")
    else:
        print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
